## Evidence

- [ ] Token counts before/after measured with `scripts/count_tokens.py` (not estimated)
- [ ] Blind-judge A/B run if the change could affect output quality (avg ≥8) — or N/A because mechanical/lossless
- [ ] Unit tests pass (`python -m unittest discover -s tests -p "test_*.py"`)
- [ ] `SKILL.md` and relevant benchmark/test updated together
